hero.name: Rusbel
hero.description: Frontend Developer specialized in React. I focus on creating modern, fast interfaces and high-quality web experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Dominican web developer passionate about technology and creating modern, fast, and responsive interfaces. I enjoy building digital experiences that are intuitive and efficient for users.
about.p2: I consider myself a dreamer, with a creative mind and great motivation to constantly learn and face new challenges in the world of web development.
about.quote: "My goal is to continue growing as a developer and create projects that add real value to people."

1.title: Task Manager
1.description: You can write down the tasks you have pending for the day and cross them out once you are getting them done.

2.title: Firebase Registration
2.description: The user will be able to sign up and log in.

3.title: Movie Search App
3.description: Connected to the API, it gives you a large catalog to search for more information about your favorite movie.

5.title: Clothing Store
5.description: Simulated e-commerce, where you can search for trending clothes.

6.title: Weather Finder
6.description: Search the weather anywhere in the world.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: You can find me on my social networks or write me directly.
